title: StellarCraft Tweaks
description: Ever wondered where the extra wood goes when crafting stairs? Apparently, it disappears into the void—but not anymore! With this datapack, you can reclaim it. and more!
body:
![Titel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52ccc6c0f2759281c4030a37b3148a4e5ff8cdf8.png)
____________________________________________________________________________________________________
Tired of wasting wood on outdated Minecraft recipes? This datapack is your fix! Enjoy more efficient crafting for fences, gates, stairs, and trapdoors:

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe64816a0470869088d7211d24065859c85843ff.png)
![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2002806f7c002668a6992fe89941b20e7b2a398.png)
![3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50d10581c465f0624834ad8ab84491df30c44398.png)

  
Spend less time chopping and more time building!

____________________________________________________________________________________________________
Often ask questions:

Can i use this in my modpack? Yes.

Can you add ..? Yes, just report it under issues.

Add version ..? Maybe, just ask.
